copy: Construction back-office is costly and slow
scenes.asset_brief: Overwhelmed contractor at desk surrounded by paper timesheets and spreadsheets, trying to manage payroll manually. Documentary style, muted blues with #1745d4 accents showing stress.
Modern dashboard interface showing payroll, HR, and compliance modules on laptop screen. Clean UI with #1745d4 primary buttons and #103197 accent highlights, construction site visible through window.
Split-screen showing field worker logging hours via mobile app on left, and office manager viewing real-time job costs on desktop on right. Brand colors #1745d4 and #103197 visible in UI elements.

copy: "Trayd cut our admin work by over 80%"
scenes.asset_brief: Anonymous professional silhouette of a construction office manager reviewing reports on a laptop, photographed from behind. Soft natural light through window. Background shows construction office with subtle #1745d4 and #103197 brand colors in decor.
Clean call-to-action screen with 'Get Demo' button in #1745d4 primary color, subtle #103197 accent. Background shows abstract construction site blueprint with brand colors integrated into lines.

music_brief: Corporate ambient, steady build, hopeful tone, 100bpm
